imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Warm-toned aerial or street-level view of colonial-style residential buildings with terracotta rooftops and lush greenery, Querétaro style (hero-nano-banana.dim_1920x1080.png)
- Elegant furnished living room interior with warm earth tones, natural light, and modern colonial decor (feature-accommodations.dim_800x600.png)
- Charming cobblestone street or plaza in a colonial Mexican town with colorful facades and blue sky (feature-locations.dim_800x600.png)
- Welcoming handshake or couple meeting a real estate agent in a bright, airy setting (feature-service.dim_800x600.png)
- Happy family or couple enjoying a sunny terrace or courtyard of a Mexican colonial home (feature-personalized.dim_800x600.png)
- Warm portrait-style photo of a professional real estate team in front of a colonial building (about-team.dim_900x700.png)

existing_features.title: Source and integrate a curated set of visually appealing property/lifestyle images from Nano Banana (https://nanobanana.com) into the landing page sections — particularly the HeroSection background, FeaturesSection cards, and/or AboutSection — replacing or supplementing any existing placeholder imagery with these new assets stored in frontend/public/assets/generated.
